mapper.select: SELECT Employee_ID AS employeeId, Name AS name, Department AS department, Contact AS contact FROM Empl ORDER BY Employee_ID
SELECT Employee_ID AS employeeId, Name AS name, Department AS department, Contact AS contact FROM Empl WHERE Employee_ID = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Empl ( Employee_ID, Name, Department, Contact ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{name}, #{department}, #{contact} )
